name: hugo-blox-academic-cv-starter
description: Academic CV starter template for Hugo Blox with Tailwind CSS v4

scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm to install dependencies.'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.validate: pnpm check:format && pnpm check:markdown && pnpm build
